ddls:
CREATE TABLE "infants" (
  "infant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the infant */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the infant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the infant */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent of the infant */,
  "birth_weight" REAL /* Weight of the infant at birth */,
  "birth_height" REAL /* Height of the infant at birth */,
  "gestational_age" INTEGER /* Gestational age at birth */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Hospital where the infant was born */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infants_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the parent */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth record */,
  "infant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the infant being measured */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the infant in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the infant in cm */,
  "age_in_months" INTEGER /* Age of the infant in months */,
  "head_circumference" REAL /* Head circumference of the infant */,
  "body_mass_index" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the infant */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_records_infant_id FOREIGN KEY ("infant_id") REFERENCES infants ("infant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category (e.g., Tiny, Newborn) */,
  "size_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the size category */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range for this size category */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range for this size category */,
  "approx_age" TEXT /* Approximate age range for this size category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developmental_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone record */,
  "infant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the infant achieving the milestone */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone achieved */,
  "milestone_date" TEXT /* Date when the milestone was achieved */,
  "milestone_type" TEXT /* Type of milestone (e.g., Motor, Cognitive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the milestone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developmental_milestones_infant_id FOREIGN KEY ("infant_id") REFERENCES infants ("infant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health visit */,
  "infant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the infant receiving care */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the health visit */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor conducting the visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes by the doctor */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of health visit (e.g., Routine, Vaccination) */,
  "vaccinations_given" TEXT /* Vaccinations given during the visit */,
  "next_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled visit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_visits_infant_id FOREIGN KEY ("infant_id") REFERENCES infants ("infant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_visits_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor (e.g., Pediatrics) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the doctor */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Hospital where the doctor practices */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth statistic record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "avg_weight" REAL /* Average weight of infants in this category */,
  "avg_height" REAL /* Average height of infants in this category */,
  "percentile" REAL /* Percentile ranking of growth in this category */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of infants in the sample */,
  "standard_deviation_weight" REAL /* Standard deviation of weight */,
  "standard_deviation_height" REAL /* Standard deviation of height */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_statistics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "infant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the infant associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., underweight, overweight) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was raised */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (resolved or unresolved) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_infant_id FOREIGN KEY ("infant_id") REFERENCES infants ("infant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., parent, doctor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
